brazil.note: (auto) Rodrygo:Brazil enters the tournament without one of its most dangerous attackers after Rodrygo suffered a season-ending knee injury.

senegal.note: Camp reportedly unsettled by off-field issues clouding the campaign; squad talent intact (Mane, Koulibaly, Mendy).
